general.title: Subset Analysis [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions: Chooses cells that either include or exclude specific label(s) within a designated annotation for downstream analysis.\ Please refer to DUET Documentation, GitHub Documentation

parameters.name: Annotation of interest
parameters.description: Annotation of interest to select labels from.

parameters.name: Labels
parameters.description: Label(s) of interest to be included/excluded from the selected annotation.

parameters.name: Include / Exclude
parameters.description: Set the functionality to either "Include" or "Exclude" selected labels
